summary.fr: Philosophe et médecin andalou, grand commentateur d'<ph id='aristotle'>Aristote</ph>, dont l'œuvre transmit l'<mv id='aristotelianism'>aristotélisme</mv> à l'Occident latin.
summary.en: Andalusian philosopher and physician, the great commentator on <ph id='aristotle'>Aristotle</ph>, whose work carried <mv id='aristotelianism'>Aristotelianism</mv> to the Latin West.
